graphPanZoomHint: Drag to pan, scroll to zoom.
graph3dHint: Drag to orbit, scroll to zoom. Teal links: parent to child. Gray links: refer-tos. Click a map node to select it in the tree; click a resource to open it.
wikiSpaceGraphInteractionHint: Drag to pan, scroll to zoom. Click a note to open it. Larger dots are more connected. If distant notes shrink the view, use Fit main cluster (expand icon) to frame the dense part.

resourceShare.title: Sharing & access
resourceShare.hint: Owner is the user who created this item. You can restrict their permissions for security control. Groups apply to members of that access group. Others applies to everyone signed in who is not the owner and not in a listed group. New channels start with empty Others until you set them.
resourceShare.ownerPermissionsRequired: Owner must keep at least one permission (Read, Write, or Manage).
resourceShare.readOnlyHint: You need Manage on this item to change sharing.
resourceShare.noGroupsToAdd: No more groups available to add.
